questions.question: If each list item has 5 nested components and you render 100 items, how many total instances are created?
When is deep component nesting inside a list item acceptable according to the performance guide?
options: When the list has fewer than 500 items
When using virtual scrolling (only ~20 items rendered at a time)
When components use the Options API instead of Composition API
When each component uses v-once for its template

questions.question: Which types of components should you replace with plain HTML elements in hot-path list items?
options: Components with tooltips and interaction state
Components that manage their own editing state
